summary: Iteration 25 testing complete. All new Dashboard settings features verified: AI Ayarları, Profili Düzenle, Rütbe & Görevler buttons and modals. Backend PUT /auth/profile endpoint working correctly. Right-click rectangle selection code verified in CanvasArea.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 25 features verified working: (1) Settings menu now contains AI Ayarları (data-testid='ai-settings-btn'), Profili Düzenle (data-testid='profile-edit-btn'), and Rütbe & Görevler (data-testid='ranks-btn') buttons. (2) AI Ayarları modal shows ZETA Özelleştirme with Mod options (Neşeli, Profesyonel, Meraklı, Özel) and Emoji options (Kullanma, Az Kullan, Orta, Çok Kullan), plus ZET Judge Mini Özelleştirme with Mod options (Normal, Sert). (3) Rütbe & Görevler modal displays complete rank list (Çırak 0XP → Kalfa 100XP → Usta 500XP → Uzman 1500XP → Maestro 5000XP → Efsane 15000XP) and Aktif Görevler section with XP rewards. (4) Profili Düzenle modal allows name update with Kaydet button, email is disabled. (5) Backend PUT /auth/profile endpoint correctly updates user name. (6) Right-click rectangle selection implemented in CanvasArea.js with rectSelectStart/rectSelectEnd state handling.
